sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, with ROSS as the central post-login surface for every subscribed user
sprint.summary: Concierge-first IA. v1 admin tabs reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the rules and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Six v1 tabs collapse to three v2 destinations behind the concierge home: Playbook / Activity / People. Phase 5 reframed 2026-05-02 — the actual scope is making ROSS the post-login destination for the first time + Hi-Fi-rewriting the public→ROSS funnel (homepage, signup, wizard) and stripping the module-launcher pattern from ROSS sidebar. Workflows are the product; v1 modules become workflow step types over time. Two tiers only: Free (full UI + 5 starter templates), All-in (full library).

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: PR #18. Audit found home feed already wired behind ROSS_HOME_REAL_DATA flag.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire right-rail + first-run findings
ROSS v2 — action handlers + snooze
phases.summary: PR #20. dispatch(action, card) + rossV2Snooze CF deployed + read-side filter.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin redesign (concierge-first IA)
phases.summary: All Phase 4 tasks merged: 4a Playbook (PRs #21/#24), 4b Activity (#23), 4c People CRUD (#25), 4d.1 Workflow editor (#28), 4d.2 Template CRUD superAdmin (#30), 4e.1 Per-task input-type editor (#32), 4e.2 Subtask→task propagation + template-level inputType editor (#35). All v2 admin tabs are flag-ON behind /ross.html and edit-capable end-to-end.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — central-funnel cleanup
phases.summary: Spec locked 2026-05-02 at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-ross-central-funnel-cleanup-design.md. Five PRs sequenced: post-login router (#37), signup v2 Hi-Fi + tier collapse (#38), homepage v2 Hi-Fi (#39), router rollout — ROSS becomes home (#40), ROSS sidebar cleanup (#41). Q1–Q5 product questions resolved: Free = full UI + 5 starter templates, day-zero = pre-populated demo workflow, v1 access = admin-only via admin-dashboard, hello = same component two data feeds, ROSS_IS_HOME flag wired for rollback safety.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — playbook UX enrichment + template library curation
phases.summary: Next sprint after Phase 5 cleanup. The Runs server surface (rossCreateRun/rossSubmitResponse + auto-flag + 422-on-required-note) is already shipped — Phase 6 is the operator-facing UX layer on top: tier-gated template list (Free=5/All-in=full from existing seed), day-zero auto-activation of one starter template, richer run execution UI honouring all 10 inputTypes, and concierge home cards driven by real activated workflows instead of scripted findings. Vocabulary per public/kb/features/ROSS.md: Templates → Workflows → Tasks → Runs. Compliance Sweep recommended as first curated template.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: Separate sprint. Anthropic-backed rossChat CF + eval harness + cost cap + web-sourced day-zero findings (weather, local events, holidays, suburb demographics).
